description: Lock the 2026-06-27 sling correction to a flexible hand sling inferred from Wadi Rabah slingstone evidence rather than a generic Ancient projectile placeholder.

checks.reason: The node now anchors to the 6th-millennium BC Wadi Rabah slingstone horizon, with uncertainty about preserved organic sling survival.
Earlier cordage technology is retained as the broad foundation for sling cords rather than a specific preserved sling-manufacturing requirement.
Leather remains only an alternate pouch material for some sling variants, not a universal requirement.
